name: martech-blog-builder
description: Converts Airtable markdown output into static HTML blog posts

scripts.watch: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');fs.watch('_posts',()=>{console.log('Change detected — rebuilding...');execSync('node build.js',{stdio:'inherit'});}); console.log('Watching _posts/ for changes...');"
